core_payload.content:
# Branch Steward Agent

## Dream Direction
In the Dream branch, Branch Steward Agent becomes a more formal branch-governance role that can explain diffs, detect contamination, guide promotion, and keep Real and Dream structurally legible even as the vault scales.

## Future Potential
- richer branch diff and promotion explanations
- clearer cleanup of stale Dream debris
- stronger coordination with review and vault-update lanes
- better operator visibility into branch drift

## Why It Matters
Dream preserves Branch Steward as the role that keeps exploration and reality from collapsing into the same graph blur.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Branch Steward Agent in the Dream branch describes a more advanced governance role for Real and Dream branch discipline. It aims toward stronger diff review, contamination detection, and clearer promotion paths between exploratory and evidence-backed structures. The capsule matters because branch clarity is one of the core sovereign advantages of the N1Hub vault. Dream therefore protects branch literacy as an operating discipline rather than a loose naming convention or improvised workflow habit.
